moduleDescription:
A variable length integer encoding implementation inspired by SQLite.

Unstable API.

entries.name: maxVarIntLen
entries.description: the maximal number of bytes a varint can take

entries.name: readVu64
entries.code:
proc readVu64(z: openArray[byte]; pResult: var uint64): int {.raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: writeVu64
entries.code:
proc writeVu64(z: var openArray[byte]; x: uint64): int {.raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description: Write a varint into z. The buffer z must be at least 9 characters long to accommodate the largest possible varint. Returns the number of bytes used.

entries.name: encodeZigzag
entries.code: proc encodeZigzag(x: int64): uint64 {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: decodeZigzag
entries.code: proc decodeZigzag(x: uint64): int64 {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
